---
title: "Documents"
subtitle: "Static club documents, bylaws, and meeting minutes"
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: _footer.html
---

### Bylaws

[Bylaws](pdfs/BylawsSilverSpursSept2022.pdf)

### Standing Rules

[Standing Rules](pdfs/StandingRulesRev2022.pdf)

### Meeting Minutes

<iframe
  class="documents-embed"
  src="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pee18sl-lCu9nYxJsY-BeXfHtx8E0TpGi9DJPE3SImI/preview"
  title="Silver Spurs meeting minutes"
></iframe>

<style>
.documents-embed {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 72vh;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
}
</style>
